description: Plugin-distributed hooks for developer-relations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 4 mechanically-detectable DevRel anti-patterns in .md artifacts — (1) a getting-started doc with no first-success/TTFS milestone, (2) a hardcoded secret/API-key literal in sample content, (3) sample code that swallows errors (empty catch / except: pass), (4) a content/calendar with no activation goal. Set DEVREL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
